title: digitalis purpurea var. carpetana
intro: Digitalis purpurea var. carpetana is a variety of the foxglove plant, known for its elegant, biennial growth habit and vibrant purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include cardiotonic and diuretic effects due to the presence of digoxin and digoxinin. The health benefits of Digitalis purpurea var. carpetana include the treatment of heart conditions such as atrial fibrillation and congestive heart failure, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be used as a tincture, tea, or capsule to harness its medicinal properties.
